title: Deduplicate Customer Records in CSV Exports
summary: Duplicate customer rows inflate counts and split history across records.

content.summary: Duplicate customer rows inflate counts and split history across records.

body.text: CRM exports often include test duplicates and merged-account artifacts. After upload, filter on email or customer_id and sort. Chart duplicate counts by source channel if available. Decide merge policy with sales ops—keep latest, sum revenue, or exclude tests.

body.alt: Analytics dashboard with charts on a laptop screen
body.caption: Analytics dashboard with charts on a laptop screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: After upload, filter on email or customer_id and sort. Chart duplicate counts by source channel if available.
Decide merge policy with sales ops—keep latest, sum revenue, or exclude tests.

items: Primary key column must be stable week to week.
Exclude internal test domains via saved rules.
Document dedup policy in report footnotes.

body.text: Push quality fixes upstream when duplicates are systematic, not one-off.
Consistent dedup rules make weekly KPIs trustworthy.
Datilio filters encode dedup exclusions you reapply on every upload.

meta_description: Duplicate customer rows inflate counts and split history across records.
